---

## Overview

> Controls mouse and keyboard actions via hand gestures using webcam.

**Gesture Control System** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with OpenCV, TensorFlow.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Image Frames"| CV["Computer Vision<br/>OpenCV"];
    CV -->|"Feature Maps"| D;
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"TensorFlow Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#120024,stroke:#d2a8ff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#1a0036,stroke:#d2a8ff,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#120024,stroke:#d2a8ff,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#1a0036,stroke:#d2a8ff,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#24004d,stroke:#d2a8ff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
Gesture-Control-System/
  .gitignore
  LICENSE
  README.md
  gui.py
  hand_tracking.py
  main.py
  requirements.txt
  system_control.py
```

<br/>

## Technical Specifications

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `Python` |
| **Project Category** | `Machine Learning / AI` |
| **Total Source Files** | `8` |
| **Frameworks** | `OpenCV`, `TensorFlow` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

## Dependencies

<p align="left">
  <code>numpy</code>  <code>screen-brightness-control</code>  <code>protobuf</code>  <code>pillow</code>  <code>customtkinter</code>  <code>pyautogui</code>  <code>opencv-python</code>  <code>tensorflow<2.15</code>  <code>mediapipe</code>
</p>
